name: GOLFTEC Colma
address: 53 Colma Blvd Suite A, Colma, CA 94014
about: GOLFTEC Colma is a golf training facility that offers data-driven lessons using advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture and high-speed video analysis. The facility provides a structured environment for golfers to improve their swing through personalized coaching plans with certified PGA instructors. Services include golf lessons, club fittings with launch monitors, and practice memberships with access to training bays. The approach is focused on measurable improvement, with on-course lessons available to apply skills in real-world conditions. GOLFTEC offers a professional, technology-centric atmosphere without food or beverage service.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and OPTIMOTION swing tracking
Certified PGA coaches with personalized improvement plans
On-course lessons for applying skills in real-world conditions
Club fitting services that add an average of 21 more yards off the tee

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent equipment from GOLFTEC. Club rentals are available as part of the service.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink to the facility?
faq.answer: No, GOLFTEC does not offer food or beverage service, and outside food or drink is not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes can vary based on the simulator setup and number of players, but typically ranges from 1.5 to 2 hours.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly? Can children take lessons?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is suitable for children. The facility provides instruction for golfers of all ages and skill levels.
